ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the cookie (e.g., user identification, campaign tracking) */,
  "lifetime" TEXT /* Lifetime of the cookie (e.g., 2 years, 1 day) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the cookie (e.g., HTML, JavaScript) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the cookie (e.g., Google) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cookie's purpose and behavior */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the cookie was first created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the cookie's information was last updated */,
  "is_third_party" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the cookie is a third-party cookie */,
  "is_essential" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the cookie is essential for the website to function */,
  "is_session_cookie" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the cookie is a session cookie */,
  "domain_restriction" TEXT /* Field to specify if the cookie is restricted to certain domains */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_provider FOREIGN KEY ("provider") REFERENCES providers ("provider_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was first added to the platform */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the domain's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the domain is active */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the domain administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_cookies" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the association between the domain and cookie was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the association was last updated */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the cookie is required for the domain to function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id", "cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the provider was first added to the platform */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the provider's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the provider is active */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the user gave consent */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the consent (e.g., accepted, declined) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user gave consent */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to give consent */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., explicit, implicit) */,
  "consent_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_blocking" (
  "blocking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blocking event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who blocked the cookie */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "blocking_date" TEXT /* Date when the user blocked the cookie */,
  "blocking_status" TEXT /* Status of the blocking (e.g., blocked, unblocked) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user blocked the cookie */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to block the cookie */,
  "blocking_type" TEXT /* Type of blocking (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "blocking_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the blocking will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blocking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_blocking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_blocking_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., cookie usage, user behavior) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
